S

SceneManager - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view
Singleton that manages scene transitions on the primary Stage.
setIntensity(int, double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.AshFX
Sets the emission rate and speed for newly spawned particles.
setIntensity(int, double) - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.IParticleEmitter
Adjusts the emission rate and speed of newly spawned particles.
setIntensity(int, double) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ParticleEmitterAdapter
Default implementation does nothing.
setMainStage(Stage) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.SceneManager
Sets the primary stage that scenes will be displayed on.
setSelection(MenuView.MenuSelection) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.MenuView
Updates the visual state of menu items based on the current selection.
setup(int, int, HBox) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.controller.WinController
Populates the win screen with game result data.
setup(int, int, HBox) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.WinView
Populates the win screen with game results and plays all win animations.
setup(int, String, HBox) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.controller.LoseController
Populates the lose screen with game result data.
setup(int, String, HBox) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.LoseView
Populates the loose screen with the game results and plays the animations.
setupAnimations(TextField, Button, Button) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Creates press animations and wires mouse-press handlers for interactive controls.
ShakeAnimation - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.animations
Shakes a node horizontally to signal an incorrect answer.
ShakeAnimation(Node) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.ShakeAnimation
Creates a shake animation for the given node.
shakeWordDisplay() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Plays a horizontal shake animation on the word display to signal a wrong answer.
showFeedback(boolean) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Shows a brief feedback message.
SlideInAnimation - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view.animations
Slides a node in from a vertical offset, overshoots slightly, then settles at Y=0.
SlideInAnimation(Node, double, double) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.animations.SlideInAnimation
Creates a slide-in animation for the given node.
split(String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.WordSplitter
Converts a word into a char array.
start() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.MenuView
Plays the initial title entrance animation and starts the beat timeline.
start(int) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.GameTimer
Starts the countdown from the specified number of seconds.
start(int) - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.ITimer
Starts the timer with the given number of seconds.
start(int) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.TimerAdapter
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.Main
JavaFX start method.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AppInitializer
Sets up the primary stage and navigates to the main menu.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.GameTimer
Stops the timeline if it is running.
stop() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.ITimer
Stops the timer immediately.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.TimerAdapter
 
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.MenuView
Stops the beat animation timeline.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.AshFX
Stops spawning new particles.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ConfettiFX
Stops spawning new particles immediately.
stop() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.IParticleEmitter
Stops spawning new particles.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.particles.ParticleEmitterAdapter
Default implementation does nothing.
stop() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.WinView
Stops the beat timeline.
stopAll() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Stops all audio: music and sound effects.
stopAllSfx() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Stops all currently playing sound effects.
stopMusic() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Stops and disposes the current music player, if any.
submitAnswer(String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Validates the player's answer submitted via button or Enter.
switchScene(String) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.SceneManager
Loads an FXML file, attaches the global stylesheet, sets it as the current scene, and returns the associated controller.
